name: fal-image
description: Image and video generation via FAL's hosted models (FLUX, Kling, Veo and others). Generate images and videos from a prompt; bind a FAL model to the Image Generation or Video Generation use case in Models. Needs a FAL API key (fal.ai).
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: FAL API Key
x-meta.help: Your FAL API key (fal.ai). Leave empty to fall back to the FAL_KEY / FAL_API_KEY environment variable.
